name: Tadabase
description: Tadabase — No-code database application builder for creating web portals and business apps with custom logic.

seo.title: Tadabase — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Tadabase: Tadabase — No-code database application builder for creating web portals and business apps with custom logic.

when_to_use: No-code web portal with custom logic built on Tadabase
Business app with role-based views and conditional logic
Client-facing data portal replacing a spreadsheet workflow
Internal ops tool for managing structured records and forms
Custom database application delivered without backend code

pros: Flexible database with real relational logic
Role-based access built in, not bolted on
cons: UI feels dated versus Glide or Softr
Learning curve for the data model
Mobile experience of built apps is average
review.verdict: Capable Knack-style database-first app builder that rewards patient users but lacks modern UX polish.
review.best_for: Small businesses building permissioned internal apps with relational data needs
review.not_for: Teams wanting modern, mobile-first UX with minimal setup
